preview.summary: Experienced finalists Croatia meet Ghana's Black Stars in a Group L decider with knockout qualification likely on the line. Croatia's veteran control through midfield faces Ghana's pace and power in a contest of contrasting profiles.
preview.homeForm: Dominated UEFA Group L, winning seven of eight and conceding just four; among the most experienced squads at the tournament.
preview.awayForm: Won CAF Group I with 25 points and 23 goals; ranked 72nd by FIFA in their fifth World Cup.
preview.homeKey: Luka Modrić, 40-year-old captain at his record fifth World Cup.
preview.awayKey: Jordan Ayew, talisman and qualifying's leading contributor.
storylines: Modrić's farewell-era Croatia chasing one more deep run
Ghana under new coach Carlos Queiroz, without injured Kudus
Both sides likely fighting for a Group L knockout spot
preview.h2h: Croatia and Ghana have met only in friendlies, with no competitive history between them.
